title: Thaumic Tinkerer
body:
![Thaumic Tinkerer Logo](https://i.imgur.com/ay34bGO.png)

Thaumic Tinkerer is now here for 1.12!

 

It is still in an alpha state. So far, just a few items have been re-added.

We now have a discord! [Just click here!](https://discord.gg/wdK3GfN37m)

 

![Essentia funnel in action](https://i.imgur.com/E8fm2ah.png?1)

  

 

And

 

 

Dislocation Focus effect:

 

I will be adding approximately one block/item a day and releasing every week or so for the foreseeable future hopefully until the mod is recreated

 

Upcoming additions: 

 

First Draft of osmotic Enchanter
